title: thelypteris guineensis
intro: Thelypteris guineensis, also known as Guinean Lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris guineensis include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory infections, among others. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused in water to utilize its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
